careers.title: CAAR — Careers
careers.hero_subtitle: Join Algeria's leading insurance company and contribute to protecting people, businesses, and infrastructure.
careers.why_desc: A national institution with decades of experience. Working here means building a long-term career while contributing to Algeria's economic stability.
careers.why_stability_desc: A long-established public institution with a strong national presence.
careers.why_expertise_desc: Exposure to complex insurance, reinsurance, and industrial risk challenges.
careers.why_impact_desc: Your work directly protects people, businesses, and infrastructure.
careers.why_growth_desc: Structured career paths, internal mobility, and professional development.
careers.life_desc: Collaborative teams, real responsibilities, long-term careers. We believe every person can grow and thrive in a shared mission to protect Algeria.
careers.profiles_desc: CAAR recruits diverse profiles across its technical, financial, and operational missions. Click a profile to explore that domain.
careers.profile_actuarial_desc: Risk analysis, underwriting, and loss modeling.
careers.profile_engineering_desc: Industrial, construction, and technical risk assessment.
careers.profile_commercial_desc: Client relations, agencies, and market development.
individual.title: CAAR — Individual Risks
individual.hero_subtitle: Protect your home, your professional premises and your property against fire, theft, natural disasters and more.
auto.title: CAAR — Auto Insurance
auto.hero_subtitle: Complete vehicle insurance — mandatory civil liability and optional guarantees to protect you on Algerian roads.
transport.title: CAAR — Transport Insurance
transport.hero_subtitle: Insurance for maritime, air and road transport — covering vessels, cargo and goods throughout their journey.
technical.title: CAAR — Technical Risks
technical.hero_subtitle: Specialised insurance for construction projects, IT systems and industrial equipment.
industrial.title: CAAR — Industrial Risks
industrial.hero_subtitle: Comprehensive insurance for industrial facilities, machinery and professional liability.
risks.industrial.mb.title: Machinery Breakdown Insurance
risks.industrial.mb.desc: Covers the cost of repair or replacement of industrial machines and equipment following sudden and accidental breakdown not resulting from wear and tear.
risks.industrial.mb.status_note: — essential for manufacturers and industrial plant operators.
risks.industrial.dec.title: Decennial Civil Liability Insurance
risks.industrial.dec.desc: Mandatory 10-year liability for construction professionals covering structural defects that compromise the integrity of a building after completion.
risks.industrial.dec.status_note: — required by Algerian construction law for all builders.
risks.industrial.rc.title: Professional Civil Liability for Contractors
risks.industrial.rc.desc: Covers the financial consequences of damages caused to third parties arising from professional activities during the construction or renovation process.
risks.industrial.rc.status_note: — strongly recommended for all contractors and builders.
risks.individual.mrh.title: Multi-Risk Home Insurance
risks.individual.mrh.desc: A comprehensive policy covering your residence and all its contents against the most common risks, giving you and your family total peace of mind.
risks.individual.mrh.status_note: — strongly recommended for homeowners and tenants alike.
risks.individual.mrp.title: Multi-Risk Professional Insurance
risks.individual.mrp.desc: Tailored protection for artisans, traders and liberal professions. Covers your premises, equipment and professional liability in a single contract.
risks.individual.mrp.status_note: — essential for any professional or business owner.
risks.individual.catnat.title: Natural Disaster Insurance
risks.individual.catnat.desc: Coverage against the consequences of exceptional natural events that can cause serious damage to property and infrastructure.
risks.individual.catnat.status_note: — required by Algerian law for all insured properties.
insurance.auto.motor.title: Motor Insurance
insurance.auto.motor.desc: Mandatory for all vehicles registered in Algeria. Covers civil liability towards third parties in the event of a traffic accident, ensuring full legal compliance.
insurance.auto.motor.status_note: — required for all vehicles on public roads in Algeria.
insurance.auto.roadside.title: Roadside Assistance
insurance.auto.roadside.desc: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, throughout the national territory. Fast response to keep you safe wherever you are.
insurance.auto.roadside.status_note: — highly recommended for all vehicle owners.
insurance.auto.glass.title: Glass Breakage Assistance
insurance.auto.glass.desc: Covers repair or replacement of all glass elements of your vehicle following impact, vandalism, or adverse weather conditions.
insurance.auto.glass.status_note: — available as an add-on to any auto policy.
insurance.transport.craft.title: Pleasure Craft Insurance
insurance.transport.craft.desc: Designed for owners of pleasure boats and non-commercial vessels. Covers the hull, equipment and civil liability towards third parties on the water.
insurance.transport.craft.status_note: — recommended for all pleasure boat owners.
insurance.transport.air.title: Air Cargo Insurance
insurance.transport.air.desc: Protects goods shipped by air against loss, damage or destruction occurring during transport, loading and unloading operations.
insurance.transport.air.status_note: — essential for importers and exporters using air freight.
insurance.transport.public.title: Goods Insurance — Public Transport
insurance.transport.public.desc: Covers goods entrusted to public road carriers for transport within Algeria or across borders. Compensation for loss or damage during transit.
insurance.transport.public.status_note: — highly recommended for businesses shipping goods by road.
insurance.transport.private.title: Goods Insurance — Private Transport
insurance.transport.private.desc: Coverage for goods transported in company-owned vehicles. Protects the shipper's own merchandise against damage or loss during movement.
insurance.transport.private.status_note: — ideal for companies with their own delivery fleet.
risks.technical.cpm.title: Contractors' Plant & Machinery Insurance
risks.technical.cpm.desc: Covers mobile and stationary construction equipment against sudden, unforeseen damage occurring on or off the construction site during operation, maintenance or transport.
risks.technical.cpm.status_note: — essential for construction companies with heavy equipment.
risks.technical.it.title: IT All Risks Insurance
risks.technical.it.desc: Comprehensive protection for all computer hardware, software and data against accidental damage, theft, power surges and other technical hazards.
risks.technical.it.status_note: — recommended for all businesses dependent on IT infrastructure.
risks.technical.car.title: Construction & Erection All Risks
risks.technical.car.desc: Covers civil engineering and erection projects against material damage and third-party liability arising throughout the construction or assembly period.
risks.technical.car.status_note: — widely required by project owners and lenders.
company.title: CAAR — About Us
company.hero_subtitle: A national insurance and reinsurance company serving individuals, professionals, and institutions since 1963.
company.overview_desc: The Compagnie Algérienne d'Assurance et de Réassurance (CAAR) is a major player in the national insurance market. Founded in 1963, it has supported the country's economic development for decades, providing comprehensive protection for individuals, businesses, and industrial complexes.
company.activities_insurance_desc: Offering a wide range of products including Automotive, Industrial Risks, Transport, and Personal insurance.
company.activities_reinsurance_desc: Providing reinsurance capacity and expertise to secure major national risks and projects.
company.activities_investments_desc: Active participation in the national financial market through strategic placements and investments.
company.leadership_preview:
Dear partners,
Dear colleagues,

Assuming the presidency of the Algerian Insurance and Reinsurance Company is for me an immense honor and a responsibility that I embrace with humility and determination.

It is also a return to an institution to which I remain deeply attached, and whose history merges with that of the economic and social development of our country.
company.leadership_full:
Dear partners,
Dear colleagues,

Assuming the presidency of the Algerian Insurance and Reinsurance Company is for me an immense honor and a responsibility that I embrace with humility and determination.

It is also a return to an institution to which I remain deeply attached, and whose history merges with that of the economic and social development of our country.

For more than six decades, the CAAR has embodied solidity, trust and commitment. It has accompanied the major changes in the national economy, protected generations of citizens, and supported the ambitions of thousands of companies. This heritage is our pride, but also our responsibility: that of keeping it alive, strengthening it, and transmitting it.

Today, a new stage opens.

Our ambition is clear: to bring the CAAR into an era of modernity and agility, while remaining faithful to its identity as a reference company, close to its clients and faithful to its values.

This involves:

• Digitize our services to offer our policyholders a smooth, fast and accessible experience;
• Strengthen our proximity with our customers, by placing their expectations and satisfaction at the heart of our priorities;
• Valuing our internal talents, by encouraging innovation, continuous training and operational excellence;
• Reaffirm our leadership role, adopting international best practices and anticipating market developments.

This transformation will not be a break, but an ambitious continuity.

It will build on the solid foundations of CAAR, while instilling a new dynamic focused on sustainable performance, social responsibility and value creation for all our stakeholders.

To our employees, partners and clients: Thank you for your trust.

The future of CAAR is built with you, and it is with you that we will face the challenges ahead.
company.history_1963_desc: CAAR was established as Algeria's national insurance and reinsurance company, tasked with protecting the country's economic development.
company.history_1988_desc: CAAR restructured into a joint-stock company, marking a pivotal shift toward a more autonomous and commercially oriented model.
company.history_2006_regulatory_desc: The company adapted to new national insurance regulations, reinforcing its governance and compliance frameworks.
company.history_2006_missions_title: The Multiple Missions of CAAR Insurance
company.history_2006_missions_desc: CAAR expanded its mandate, broadening its portfolio across insurance, reinsurance, and financial investment activities.
company.history_2011_desc: CAAR launched CAARAMA, a dedicated subsidiary reinforcing its presence in specialized insurance segments.
company.history_today_desc: CAAR has not only maintained its position as a leader in industrial risk but has also increased its market share, continuing to serve individuals, businesses, and major national projects.

news.hero_subtitle: Practical guidance to help you understand risks, procedures, and your rights as a policyholder.
news.advice_intro: Choose a topic to access practical insurance advice and understand procedures, coverage, and your rights as a policyholder.
news.advice_road_title: What to do after a road accident?
news.advice_road_description: Knowing the correct steps to take after a road accident helps protect your safety and ensures a smoother insurance process.
news.advice_road_step1: Secure the accident area and ensure everyone's safety
news.advice_road_step3: Document damages and collect information from all parties
news.advice_road_step4: Inform your insurance company as soon as possible
news.advice_home_title: How to properly protect your home?
news.advice_home_description: Home insurance helps protect your property and belongings against common risks such as fire, water damage, and theft.
news.advice_home_step1: Identify the main risks affecting your home
news.advice_home_step2: Insure both the building and its contents when applicable
news.advice_home_step3: Accurately declare the value of your belongings
news.advice_home_step4: Regularly update your contract after renovations or new purchases
news.advice_business_description: Business insurance protects companies against operational, financial, and liability risks that may threaten their activity.
news.advice_business_step1: Identify risks related to your business activity and sector
news.advice_business_step2: Insure company assets: buildings, equipment, and stock
news.advice_business_step3: Protect your business against third-party liability
news.advice_business_step4: Review coverage regularly as the business grows
news.advice_basics_description: Insurance is a financial protection mechanism that helps individuals and businesses manage risks and unforeseen events.
news.advice_basics_step1: Understand the difference between mandatory and optional coverage
news.advice_basics_step2: Know what risks are covered and what exclusions apply
news.advice_basics_step3: Choose coverage adapted to your personal or professional situation
news.advice_basics_step4: Respect contract conditions to avoid claim rejection

article.accident_causes_title: Main Causes of Road Accidents in Algeria
article.accident_causes_text: Statistical research consistently shows that the human factor is the primary cause of road accidents in Algeria, responsible for the vast majority of incidents. Vehicle condition and road infrastructure have a comparatively smaller impact.
article.accident_factors_title: Four Key Factors Influencing Automobile Claims
article.accident_factors_text: Using statistical analysis, research has identified four main factors that influence automobile insurance claims in Algeria:
article.accident_what_to_do: What to Do After an Accident
article.accident_what_to_do_text: Knowing the correct steps to take immediately after a road accident protects your safety and ensures a smoother insurance claims process:
article.accident_conclusion_text: Automobile claims in Algeria are primarily influenced by driver behavior and vehicle usage rather than vehicle age or road conditions alone. Understanding these factors helps insurance companies improve risk assessment, pricing policies, and develop targeted accident prevention strategies that benefit all drivers.
article.accident_intro: Road accidents are increasing across Algeria and represent a major financial burden for insurance companies due to the high cost of compensation for both material and bodily damages. Understanding the causes and factors behind claims helps both insurers and drivers make better decisions.
article.basics_what_is_text: Insurance is a financial agreement that protects individuals or businesses from unexpected financial losses. In this agreement, the insured person pays a premium to an insurance company in exchange for coverage against specific risks such as accidents, illness, property damage, or death.
article.basics_principle: The fundamental principle of insurance is risk transfer: instead of bearing the full financial cost of a loss yourself, you pay a smaller, regular premium and the insurance company assumes the financial risk on your behalf.
article.basics_claims_text: Insurance works through a claims process. When a covered event occurs, the insured files a claim, and the insurance company compensates the insured or pays the service provider according to the policy terms and coverage limits.
article.basics_types_text: There are several common types of insurance, each providing protection for different risks and situations:
article.basics_why_text: The main purpose of insurance is to provide financial security against unpredictable events. Key benefits include:
article.basics_conclusion: Understanding your insurance coverage is the first step toward better financial security. CAAR's network of agencies across Algeria is here to help you choose the right coverage for your situation.
article.business_what_is_text: Business insurance is essential for protecting a company from risks and financial losses that may occur during its operations. It works by transferring the risk from the business to the insurance company. The business pays a premium, and in return, the insurer agrees to cover specific risks defined in the insurance policy.
article.business_without: Without adequate insurance, a single unexpected event — a fire, a lawsuit, or equipment failure — could threaten the entire financial health of a business.
article.business_claims_text: If a covered event occurs, the business can file a claim to receive compensation for the financial losses. The process typically follows these steps:
article.business_coverage_text: Each insurance policy includes specific terms, coverage limits, and exclusions. Business owners should understand the main types of coverage available:
article.business_choosing_text: Working with an experienced insurance agent can help businesses choose the right coverage and adapt the policy to their specific needs. Consider the following when reviewing your business insurance:
